char_list.name: GAV character list.docx
char_list._note: Box: Rian - External Storage/JioStar/2026_04_09_018 (Kamen Rider)/Original - Source Files/Updated/Character list/. Table: Character | Pic | Voice name (e.g. Shouma -> KMR_GAV_Shouma) — canonical names + studio voice-name convention, usable as a mapping roster.

voice_list.name: KAMEN RIDER CHARACTER LIST & VOICES.xlsx
voice_list._note: The studio's master character->ElevenLabs voice-id sheet (per language + Granute form). Fetched live from Box at run time and parsed into the voice bank (see backend/voices.refresh_from_box) so the excel report's Voice-ID check reflects the CURRENT sheet, not a committed snapshot.

kamen-rider-gavv._notes: Box folder ids for Kamen Rider Gavv. char_list.search_folders is a best-guess (the scripts folder); if the character-list workbook lives elsewhere in Box, drop its folder id (or a direct file_id) here. Adding another series = another top-level entry; no code change.
